sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Mi Khempeuh' Thu A Manin Khen

verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin midangte' thu a khen note pen kuakua hita le uh cin na suakta tuan kei ding uh hi. Midangte na mawhsakna uh thute mah note zong gamta veve na hih manun no zong a mawh mah na hi uh hi
Tua bang mawhna a gamtate, Pasian in gim a piak pen a man mah ahihna i thei ciat hi
Midangte a mawhna hangin thu khenin, no zong tua amau mawhnate mah na bawl veve uh ciangin Pasian' thukhenna tawh kipelh tuan dingin ki-um peuhmah na hi uh hiam
Pasian migi-in thu a diah hithiatna pen na kisikkik theihna ding uh a deihna ahih lamtak phawkkha loin, a migitna, a lungduaina, a hong thuaknate neu ngaihsutkha na hi uh hiam
Lungsim khauhin na kisik noplohna hangun Pasian' hehna leh a manin a thukhenna a hong kilat Ni ding ciangin na gimthuak ding uh a nasia semsem dingin a bawl na hi uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in mi khempeuh a gamtatna uh tawh kizui-in thukkik ding hi
Pahtakna, minthan'na, leh hin' tawntungna deihin a gamtat hoih tawntung mite tungah Pasian in nuntak tawntungna pia ding a
ahi zongin ama deihna bek zui-in, a gamtat dingin a kilawm bangin gamta loin, a manloin a gamta mite tungah Pasian in ama hehna hangin gimna tungsak ding hi
Jew mi-a kipan Gentail mi dongin a gamtat sia mi khempeuh in gimna leh lungkhamna thuak ding uh hi
Tua mah bangin Jew mi-a kipanin Gentail mi dongin a gamtat hoih mi khempeuh in minthan'na, pahtawina, leh nopsakna ngah ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in kuamah deidan loin mi khempeuh tungah a kibangin thu a khen hi
Moses Thukham a neilo Gentail mite a khialh uh ciangin thukham neilopi mahin siatna thuak uh a, Moses Thukham a nei Jew mite a khialh uh ciangin tua thukham tawh kizui-in amaute tungah thu kikhen hi
Thukham zakna bek hangin Pasian tawh kipawlna a piang hilo a, thukham sunga Pasian' genna bangin a gamtate bek Pasian tawh a kipawl thei ahi hi

Gentail mite in thukham a neihloh uh hangin amau' ngaihsut tawmna tawh thukham' deihna bang a gamtat uh ciangin tua thukham' deihna a zui uh hi a, thukham a neihloh uh hangin a gamtat dingun a kilawm amau mahmah in a thei tawm uh ahi hi

Amau' lungsim sungah thukham' deihnate omkhin ahihna thu a gamtatna un hong kilangsak hi. Amau mahmah zong khat veivei hoih kisa, khat veivei sia kisa uh ahih manin, amau' lungsim sungah thukham' deihnate theihna omkhin ahihna thu, hih amau' kiphawk tawmna lungsim in nakpi takin hong kitelsak hi
Tua ahih ciangin Pasian in mihingte lungsim sunga a ngaihsutnate uh, Jesuh Khrih thu a khensak Ni ciangin, tu-a ka hong gen bang teekteekin a hong piang ding ahi hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Thukham in Jew mite A Sukkhakna Zia

verses.text: Tu-in Jew mi ka hi uh, a ci note in thukham suan' belin nei-in Pasian na theihna uh na kisialhpih uh hi
Thukham thei na hih manun Pasian' deihnate na thei uh a, a man leh a manlo na khenthei uh hi
Mittawte lam a lak ding, khuamial sunga om mite khuavak a musak ding
mihaite a hilh ding, naupangte a hilh dingte ihi a, thukham sunga om thu khempeuh thei-in i gen khempeuh man mahmah hi, ci-in na kimuang uh hi
Midangte a hilh note in, nomau mah kihilhlo ding na hi uh hiam? “Guta kei un,” ci-in mi hilh napi-in nomau mahmah guta hilo na hi uh hiam
“Numei tawh mawh kei un,” ci-in mi hilh napi-in nomau mahmah mawh hilo na hi uh hiam? Milimte mudah napi-in milim biakna inn sunga nate gu hilo na hi uh hiam
Note in thukham kisaktheihpih napi-in thukham palsatin Pasian' min na daisak uh hi
Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “No Jew mite' hangin Gentail mite lakah Pasian kigensia hi,” ci-in kigelh hi
Thukham zui le uh cin na vun atna uh man nei takpi mah hi. Ahi zongin thukham na zuih kei uh leh na vun atna uh a mawkna a suak ahi hi
Tua ahih manin vun ki-atlo Gentail mite in thukham a zuih nak uh leh Pasian in vun at mah bangin ngaihsun ding hilo ahi hiam
Tua ahih manin thukham nei-in vun ki-at napi-in tua thukham a zuilo no Jew mite pen vun ki-atlo thukham a zui Gentail mite in thu hong khen ding hilo ahi uh hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh a pualam beka Jew mi hihna leh a pualam vun ki-atna lel bek in Jew mi taktak suaksak zolo hi

Jew mi taktak i cihte pen, a sunglamah Jew mi ahite ahi hi. A vun ki-atna uh lungsim vun atna hi a, kha thu tawh a kisai ahi hi. Thukham zui-in pumpi tung vun atna pawl hilo hi. Hih bang mite pen mihingte in phatloin Pasian in phatin a pakta hi.
